SEARCH

All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
AdminGUI
Admin GUI handler for the voting plugin.
AdminVoteConfirmation
Abstract class for admin vote confirmation dialogs.
AdminVoteHelp
Admin help GUI handler.
AdminVoteLogEventSelect
Admin GUI: Select an event filter, then open AdminVoteLogRecent (filtered).
AdminVoteLogHelpers
Helper class for admin vote log GUI operations.
AdminVoteLogMenu
Admin vote log menu GUI handler.
AdminVoteLogPlayer
Admin GUI: VoteLog entries for a given player (paged).
AdminVoteLogPlayerSelect
Admin GUI: Select an ONLINE player, then open AdminVoteLogPlayer.
AdminVoteLogPlayerSelectOnline
Admin GUI: Select an ONLINE player, then open AdminVoteLogPlayer.
AdminVoteLogRecent
Admin GUI: Recent VoteLog entries (paged).
AdminVoteLogServer
Admin GUI: VoteLog entries for a given server (paged).
AdminVoteLogServerSelect
Admin GUI: Select a server (distinct list), then open AdminVoteLogServer.
AdminVoteLogService
Admin GUI: VoteLog entries for a given service/site (paged).
AdminVoteLogServiceSelect
Admin GUI: Select a service (distinct list), then open AdminVoteLogService.
AdminVoteLogServiceSelectAll
Admin GUI: Select a service from DB (distinct services), then open AdminVoteLogService.
AdminVoteLogStats
Admin GUI: VoteLog stats overview.
AdminVoteLogVoteId
Admin GUI: VoteLog entries for a given voteId (paged).
AdminVotePerms
Admin permissions GUI handler.
AdminVotePlaceholders
Admin placeholders GUI handler.
AdminVotePlaceholdersPlayer
Admin placeholders player GUI handler.
AdminVoteTabCompleter
The Class AdminVoteTabCompleter.
AdminVoteTopPoints
Admin top points GUI handler.
AdminVoteVoteMilestoneRemove
Admin vote milestone remove GUI handler.
AdminVoteVoteMilestones
Admin vote milestones GUI handler.
AdminVoteVoteParty
Admin vote party GUI handler.
AdminVoteVotePlayer
Admin vote player GUI handler.
AdminVoteVoteShop
Admin vote shop GUI handler.
AdminVoteVoteShopCategories
Admin vote shop categories GUI handler.
AdminVoteVoteShopCategory
Admin vote shop category GUI handler.
AdminVoteVoteShopCategoryRemove
Admin vote shop category remove GUI handler.
AdminVoteVoteShopItem
Admin vote shop item GUI handler.
AdminVoteVoteShopItemRemove
Admin vote shop item remove GUI handler.
AdminVoteVoteShopItems
Admin vote shop items GUI handler.
AliasCommandFilterListener
Filters VotingPlugin command aliases from tab completion when aliases are disabled.
AliasesTabCompleter
The Class AliasesTabCompleter.
AtMatcher
Supports: - At: 0 - At: 50 - At: [20, 50, 100] - At: - 10..200 step 10 - 250 Stateless evaluation: matches based solely on newTotal.
BlockBreak
The Class BlockBreak.
BroadcastFormat
Defines HOW vote broadcasts are rendered.
BroadcastHandler
Core broadcast logic.
BroadcastSettings
Immutable broadcast configuration.
BStatsMetricsBungee
bStats collects some data for plugin authors.
BStatsMetricsBungee.AdvancedBarChart
Represents a custom advanced bar chart.
BStatsMetricsBungee.AdvancedPie
Represents a custom advanced pie.
BStatsMetricsBungee.CustomChart
Represents a custom chart.
BStatsMetricsBungee.DrilldownPie
Represents a custom drilldown pie.
BStatsMetricsBungee.MultiLineChart
Represents a custom multi line chart.
BStatsMetricsBungee.SimpleBarChart
Represents a custom simple bar chart.
BStatsMetricsBungee.SimplePie
Represents a custom simple pie.
BStatsMetricsBungee.SingleLineChart
Represents a custom single line chart.
BungeeConfig
Configuration implementation for Bungee proxy server.
BungeeHandler
Handler for Bungee/proxy server integration.
BungeeJsonNonVotedPlayersCache
JSON file-based storage for non-voted players cache on Bungee.
BungeeJsonVoteCache
JSON file-based vote cache for Bungee.
BungeeMethod
Enumeration of available Bungee connection methods.
BungeeSettings
Configuration file for Bungee/proxy settings.
CheckUpdate
The Class CheckUpdate.
CommandAdminVote
The Class CommandAdminVote.
CommandAliases
The Class CommandAliases.
CommandLoader
The Class CommandLoader.
CommandVote
The Class CommandVote.
Config
The Class Config.
ConfigDataNode
ConfigurationNode-based implementation of DataNode.
ConfigVoteSites
The Class ConfigVoteSites.
CoolDownCheck
Manages cooldown checks for vote rewards.
DataNode
Interface for data node operations.
DiscordHandler
Handler for Discord integration.
DiscordRateLimitUtil
Utility methods for handling Discord webhook rate-limit responses.
DiscordWebhookPayloadBuilder
Builds Discord-compatible webhook JSON payloads.
DisplayInfo
Represents display information for a preset.
Fragment
Represents a fragment defined in a preset meta JSON file.
GitHubVoteSitePresetLoader
Utility class for loading vote site presets from GitHub.
GsonDataNode
Implementation of DataNode using Google Gson.
GUI
GUI configuration.
INonVotedPlayersStorage
Interface for storing non-voted players data.
INonVotedPlayersStorage.NonVotedPlayerEntry
Entry for a non-voted player.
IVoteCache
Interface for vote caching operations.
MatchInfo
Represents matching information for a preset.
MultiProxyHandler
Abstract handler for multi-proxy support.
MultiProxyMethod
Multi-proxy communication methods.
MultiProxyServerSocketConfiguration
Configuration for a multi-proxy server socket.
MultiProxyServerSocketConfigurationBungee
Multi-proxy server socket configuration for Bungee.
MultiProxyServerSocketConfigurationVelocity
Multi-proxy server socket configuration for Velocity.
MVdWPlaceholders
The Class PlaceHolders.
MySQLNonVotedPlayersStorage
MySQL storage for non-voted players.
NameMCLikeCheckerTask
Periodically checks NameMC likes for the configured server and gives a one-time reward to players who have not claimed it yet.
NextSite
Represents the next available vote site.
NonVotedPlayersCache
Cache for players who haven't voted yet.
OfflineBungeeVote
Represents an offline bungee vote.
OfflineMode
Enum for offline broadcast modes.
PlaceholderCacheLevel
Enum for placeholder cache levels.
PlaceholderDef
Represents a placeholder definition loaded from a preset meta JSON file.
PlaceholderExpander
Placeholder expansion abstraction.
PlaceHolders
The Class PlaceHolders.
PlayerInteract
The Class PlayerInteract.
PlayerJoinEvent
The Class PlayerJoinEvent.
PlayerPostVoteEvent
The Class PlayerVoteEvent.
PlayerPostVoteLoggerListener
Listener for logging player post-vote events.
PlayerReceivePointsEvent
The Class PlayerVoteEvent.
PlayerSpecialRewardEvent
The Class PlayerVoteEvent.
PlayerSpecialRewardLoggerListener
Listener for logging player special reward events.
PlayerVoteCoolDownEndEvent
The Class PlayerVoteEvent.
PlayerVoteEvent
The Class PlayerVoteEvent.
PlayerVoteListener
The Class VotiferEvent.
PlayerVoteSiteCoolDownEndEvent
The Class PlayerVoteEvent.
ProxyBroadcastDecider
Decides where vote broadcasts should execute (proxy-side routing only).
ProxyMysqlUserTable
Proxy MySQL user table for managing voting plugin user data.
ProxyNonVotedPlayersTable
Table for tracking non-voted players in the proxy cache.
ProxyNonVotedPlayersTable.NonVotedPlayerRow
Represents a row in the non-voted players table.
ProxyOnlineVoteCacheTable
Table for caching online votes in the proxy.
ProxyOnlineVoteCacheTable.VoteRow
Represents a row in the online vote cache table.
ProxyTimedVoteCacheTable
Table for caching timed votes in the proxy.
ProxyTimedVoteCacheTable.TimedVoteRow
Represents a row in the timed vote cache table.
ProxyVoteCacheTable
Proxy vote cache (per-server cached votes).
ProxyVoteCacheTable.VoteRow
Represents a row in the vote cache table.
ProxyVoteDelayCheck
Handles the WaitUntilVoteDelay exception for votes queued by a proxy.
ProxyVotifierEvent
Handler for triggering Bungee Votifier events.
RangeSpec
Parses: - "10..200 step 10" - "10..200" Expands to discrete values (simple + predictable for server owners).
ScopeMode
Proxy-side routing scope for broadcast triggers.
ServerData
The Class ServerData.
ServiceSiteHandler
Handles service site name/value mappings.
ShopFile
The ShopFile class manages the vote shop configuration.
SignChange
The Class SignChange.
SignHandler
The Class SignHandler.
Signs
The Class Signs.
SpecialRewards
The Class OtherVoteReward.
SpecialRewardsConfig
The SpecialRewardsConfig class manages special rewards configuration.
SpecialRewardType
Enumeration for different special reward types.
TimeQueueHandler
The TimeQueueHandler class manages time-based vote queue processing.
TopVoter
Enumeration for different top voter time periods.
TopVoterHandler
Handles top voter rankings and statistics.
TopVoterPlayer
Represents a top voter player with ranking information.
UserDataVoteReminderCooldownStore
Uses VotingPluginUser.getUserData() cached columns: - VoteRemindersLast (BIGINT) - VoteRemindersMap (LONGTEXT) format: name=ms;name=ms NOTE: tryClaimGlobal is best-effort and not proxy-atomic unless your storage layer supports conditional updates.
UserManager
Manages VotingPlugin user operations and data.
VelocityConfig
Configuration file handler for Velocity proxy.
VelocityJsonNonVotedPlayersCache
JSON-based non-voted players cache for Velocity proxy.
VelocityJsonVoteCache
JSON-based vote cache implementation for Velocity proxy.
VoteBest
GUI handler for vote best/streak display.
VoteBroadcastType
Defines WHEN vote broadcasts occur.
VoteCacheHandler
Handles caching of votes for proxy servers.
VoteEventBungee
Handles vote events from Bungee proxy.
VoteEventVelocity
Handles vote events from Velocity proxy.
VoteGUI
GUI handler for vote interface.
VoteHelp
GUI handler for vote help display.
VoteLast
GUI handler for displaying last vote information.
VoteLogMysqlTable
Vote log table usable from BOTH proxy and backend.
VoteLogMysqlTable.ServerCount
Holds server name and vote count.
VoteLogMysqlTable.ServiceCount
Holds service name and vote count.
VoteLogMysqlTable.VoteLogCounts
Holds vote count statistics.
VoteLogMysqlTable.VoteLogEntry
Represents a single vote log entry from the database.
VoteLogMysqlTable.VoteLogEvent
Event types that can be logged in the vote log.
VoteLogMysqlTable.VoteLogStatus
Status types for vote processing.
VoteMilestone
Represents a single VoteMilestone entry.
VoteMilestoneGroupParser
Utility class for parsing vote milestone group configuration.
VoteMilestoneGroupSelect
Enum for selecting which milestones to trigger when multiple match in a group.
VoteMilestoneLimit
Per-milestone retrigger limiter.
VoteMilestoneLimit.Type
Limit types for milestone retriggering.
VoteMilestoneRewardEvent
Fired after a VoteMilestone reward has been executed successfully.
VoteMilestonesConfig
Configuration for vote milestones.
VoteMilestonesManager
Evaluates VoteMilestones on each vote.
VoteMilestonesMigrator
Legacy migration: - Uses SpecialRewards.yml root as the reward container so reward paths can be absolute. - FirstVote / FirstVoteToday: rewards are on the section itself (no "Rewards" child) - Cumulative / MileStones: rewards are under "...Rewards" - Totals are mapped into VoteMilestoneTotal (votes + points + legacy counter) Adds per-milestone Limit support (default NONE).
VoteMilestoneTotal
Defines what numeric value a VoteMilestone evaluates against.
VoteMilestoneVoteLogListener
Logs VoteMilestone reward executions to the VoteLog table.
VoteNext
GUI handler for displaying next vote information.
VoteParty
The Class VoteParty.
VotePartyEvent
The Class PlayerVoteEvent.
VoteReminderCooldownStore
Interface for storing and managing vote reminder cooldowns.
VoteRemindersLegacyMigrator
Utility class for migrating legacy vote reminding configuration to the new format.
VoteRemindersListener
Listener for vote reminder events.
VoteRemindersManager
VoteReminders core manager (no Bukkit repeating tasks).
VoteRemindersManager.VoteReminderConditions
 
VoteRemindersManager.VoteReminderCooldowns
 
VoteRemindersManager.VoteReminderDefinition
 
VoteRemindersManager.VoteReminderOptions

VoteShop
Main vote shop GUI.
VoteShopCategory
Vote shop category.
VoteShopCategoryButton
Vote shop entry that opens a category.
VoteShopCategoryMenu
Vote shop category GUI.
VoteShopConfirm
Confirmation GUI for vote shop purchases.
VoteShopDefinition
Full vote shop definition.
VoteShopEntry
Base vote shop entry.
VoteShopExtraItem
Extra vote shop item.
VoteShopItem
Purchasable vote shop item.
VoteShopLoader
Loads vote shop data from ShopFile.
VoteShopManager
Central vote shop manager.
VoteShopPurchaseEvent
Fired when a player attempts to purchase an item from VotingPlugin's VoteShop.
VoteShopPurchaseLoggerListener
 
VoteShopPurchaseResult
Result of a vote shop purchase validation or execution.
VoteShopPurchaseService
Handles vote shop validation and purchases.
VoteSite
The Class VoteSite.
VoteSiteJsonPresetManager
Manager responsible for loading vote site presets defined in JSON and applying them to the VotingPlugin configuration.
VoteSiteManager
 
VoteSitePreset
Represents a vote site preset as defined in a meta JSON file.
VoteSitePresetSetupHandler
Handler class that guides a player through selecting a vote site preset and configuring its placeholder values using the SimpleAPI ValueRequest system.

VoteStreakHandler
 
VoteStreakType

VotingPluginVelocity
VotingPlugin proxy implementation for Velocity.
VotingPluginVelocityCommand
 
VotingPluginWebhooks
Convenience wrapper to manage webhook lifecycle within VotingPlugin.
VotingPluginWire
Canonical wire format for proxy - backend messages.
VotingPluginWire.Vote
 
VotingPluginWire.VoteUpdate
 
WebhookConfigLoader
Loads webhook definitions from VotingPlugin's Config.yml section.
WebhookDefinition
Webhook endpoint definition.
WebhookHttpMethod
Supported HTTP methods for webhook requests.
WebhookLogger
Logging abstraction for the webhook subsystem.
WebhookRequest
A queued webhook request.
WebhookRewardEntry
Represents one webhook entry under a reward's "Webhooks:" list.
WebhookRewardExecutor
Executes webhook rewards using configured definitions.
WebhookRewardParser
Parses reward "Webhooks:" entries from a Bukkit ConfigurationSection.
WebhookService
Asynchronous webhook dispatcher.
WebhookSignatureConfig
Signature configuration used to sign webhook payloads for verification by the receiver.
WebhookSigner
Signs webhook payloads for receiver verification.
